name: pixel-ark-image2
description: Pixel Ark Image2 is a local GPT Image compatible Codex plugin for generating, editing, extracting, and previewing image assets.

interface.shortDescription: Generate and edit images with direct previews
interface.longDescription: Use Pixel Ark Image2 to generate images, edit images, extract transparent assets from flattened designs, and run async image jobs from Codex. The plugin reads API settings from ~/.codex/image2-mcp.env or environment variables, saves output locally, and should return generated images as inline previews whenever possible.
defaultPrompt: Generate an image and show me the preview
Edit this image and preview the result
Extract transparent elements from this design
